tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Industry Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Industry Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This factory manufactures clothes. The machine runs day and night. Workers work hard. Production has increased. The manager gives instructions to the team.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Industry Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Industry Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This industry is growing rapidly. We import raw material from abroad. India exports clothes to other countries. The manufacturing process is complex. Quality control is necessary.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "आपूर्ति श्रृंखला में देरी हुई।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: There was a delay in the supply chain.

tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Industry Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Industry Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Workers need safety equipment. This industry creates employment. The demand for the product has increased. New technology was installed in the factory.
